title: The Straw Hats Break CP9’s Wall
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Nami, CP9, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Nami, CP9, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the straw hats break cp9’s wall.

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: Zoan user... Is that your Trump card!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It does look like a rein- deer...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What... Happened to your Appea- Rance ...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I wonder where this monster came from.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: DON'T TOUCH HIM!! He's my nakama!!!
